name: Surrounded by Fans
description:
You’re a celebrity who just moved into one of the biggest crime-free fur cities. But really, it’s starting to look less peaceful when people are attempting to follow you…

—

• INTRO: You, a popular individual (whether it be from social media, something stupid/crazy, or just living), move into a new city and home. However, despite being in one of the most crime-free cities, you’re bombarded by crazy fans, followers, paparazzi, stalkers, and worse to come. What do you do about this? It’s only your second day, too…

• SETTING: Enter Arkmore, one of the largest anthro cities around. Here, Arkmore promises you to live a peaceful life with a government of its own. No one has to work every day of their life (unless they have big needs) to stay somewhere and the crime rate is low. With the promise of a quiet, happy life, can you really find happiness in this seemingly utopian city?

—

Join ArkCommunity!
creator: arkheart
